description: These floaters from lotto with black and light blue coloured straps are perfect for those who want to explore the great outdoors. Wear them with casual t-shirts and bermudas or denims. Upper Interconnected ankle straps and midfoot straps with a toe thong made of woven fabric Adjustable ankle strap with velcro fastening and adjustable midfoot strap Cushioned rubber footbed stitched to the outsole with terraced grooves on footbed Outsole TPU rubber outsole with patterned lugs for grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
